svg.title: Synalux POS — multi location
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for multi location. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Venue switcher, per-venue KPIs, consolidated P&L, config sync -- DB: pos_locations
123 Main St, New York, NY -- Location ID: loc_01
All locations share same menu (edits apply everywhere)
Corporate can view all location data
Franchise invite: email -> new user -> scoped to location_id via RLS
Each location = separate pos_locations row. RLS scopes all pos_* tables by location_id.
Schema: pos_locations | pos_menu_items | pos_royalty_configs | pos_payments | pos_location_users
